title: Skill Frontmatter Schema
description: Schema for Claude Code skill (SKILL.md) YAML frontmatter fields

description.description: Brief description of the skill's purpose

argument-hint.description: Hint text shown for the skill's argument in the UI

disable-model-invocation.description: When true, prevents the model from invoking this skill automatically

user-invocable.description: Whether the skill can be invoked by the user via slash command

allowed-tools.description: List of tools this skill is allowed to use

model.description: Model override for this skill (e.g., sonnet, opus, haiku)

effort.description: Reasoning effort level for the skill

context.description: List of context files or patterns to include when the skill runs

agent.description: Agent to delegate skill execution to

hooks.description: Hook configuration specific to this skill

paths.description: Glob patterns for files this skill applies to

shell.description: Shell to use for command execution within this skill
